heading: Purpose
label: 1831 Purpose
text: It is the purpose of this subchapter to provide grants for the encouragement of endowment funds for the operation and improvement of tribally controlled colleges or universities.
notes: Amendments1998— substituted “colleges or universities” for “community colleges”.Pub. L. 105–244
